frame_eqs_str: a['vol_now']=((0.4*a['bass'])+(0.1*((a['bass_att']+a['treb'])+a['mid']))); a['vol_mean']=((Math.abs(equal(mod(a['frame'],50), 0))>0.00001)?((a['vol_mean']-(0.5*(a['vol_mean']-a['vol_now'])))):((0.1*((a['vol_mean']*9)+a['vol_now'])))); a['beat']=((Math.abs(above(a['vol_now'], (1.15*a['vol_mean'])))>0.00001)?(1):(0)); a['sinbeat']=Math.sin((a['beat']*(a['vol_now']-a['vol_mean']))); a['slowtime']=(a['slowtime']+(a['beat']*a['time'])); a['rot']=(a['rot']+(0.10*Math.sin(a['time']))); a['cx']=Math.sin(a['slowtime']); a['mv_g']=(0.2*Math.abs(Math.sin(a['time']))); a['myb']=(Math.cos(a['slowtime'])+Math.abs(Math.cos(a['slowtime']))); a['myg']=(Math.abs(Math.sin(a['slowtime']))+0.2); a['q2']=((Math.abs(above(a['myg'], 1))>0.00001)?(0.4):(((Math.abs(above(a['myg'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.min(Math.abs(a['myg']), 0.4)):(0)))); a['q3']=((Math.abs(above(a['myb'], 1))>0.00001)?(0.2):(((Math.abs(above(a['myb'], 0))>0.00001)?(Math.min(Math.abs(a['myb']), 0.2)):(0)))); a['q4']=a['cx']; a['q1']=a['rot'];
